message:
test(conformance): differential harness for regex.h vs glibc

CONFORMANCE: libc regex.h diff matrix.

3 functions, 4 tests. regex_t is layout-incompatible between
FrankenLibC and glibc (each overlays its own bookkeeping fields), so
each test compiles the same pattern in BOTH backends and compares the
match result + captured substrings.

- basic_match_match: 11 (pattern, input, cflags, expected) cases incl.
  literal/^anchor/$anchor/. wildcard/* quantifier/[0-9]+ ERE class/
  alternation/REG_ICASE
- capture_offsets: 4 patterns with capture groups; rm_so/rm_eo for
  each pmatch[i] must match between impls
- invalid_patterns: unclosed bracket / unclosed group / dangling
  backslash; success-match parity (both reject)

regcomp/regexec/regfree declared via local extern blocks. preg buffer
allocated as 256 bytes to accommodate both impls' overlays (glibc's
regex_t is 64 bytes; frankenlibc's is similar size).

0 divergences observed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
